must_detect.matched_text: Status: The Company entered a non-binding term sheet on 27 May 2569 (ยังไม่ได้เปิดเผย/Non‑public) for a THB 450m secured cross‑border facility with Yamato Capital KK and Lanka Trade Finance PLC; closing contingent on CPX clearance and TCMA notification.

To: Board Risk Committee and Legal; From: Ms. Ratchada Pimvan (Compliance Officer), ratchada.p@aurorasiam.co.th; Date: 29 May 2569
Status: The Company entered a non-binding term sheet on 27 May 2569 (ยังไม่ได้เปิดเผย/Non‑public) for a THB 450m secured cross‑border facility with Yamato Capital KK and Lanka Trade Finance PLC; closing contingent on CPX clearance and TCMA notification.
Materiality: Facility equals ~42% of FY2568 consolidated EBITDA, likely material to AuroraSiam PCL for issuer‑relative purposes under CPX Listing Rule 24/2566; upon execution of definitive documents, disclosure is required via CPXLink before 09:00 of the next trading session.
MNPI handling: Until announced via CPXLink, the pricing grid (5.25–6.10% p.a.), leverage covenant (≤3.0x), and use of proceeds (Udon Thani solar expansion) are undisclosed and constitute MNPI under the Securities and Listings Code (Sections 57–60 analogs).
Employment: Offer to incoming CTO, Khun Wirote Chanakul, includes a sign‑on RSU grant of 1.2m units subject to shareholder approval at the EGM; this has not been announced and remains non‑public; retain under blackout.
Selective disclosure risk: Mr. Sorawit Dech’s email to a single analyst at Golden Palm Partners on 28 May 2569 referencing “bridge facility signing next week” may constitute selective disclosure; refrain from investor contact until clean disclosure is made.
Blackout/quiet period: Insider trading blackout remains in effect from Q2 quarter‑end (30 Jun 2569) until one full trading day after CPX acceptance of the Q2 interim report per Listing Guideline 15/2565; exceptions require Legal sign‑off.
Public‑status cross‑check: The commissioning of the Rayong Module Line (Phase 1) was publicly announced via CPXLink news release dated 15 May 2569 and summarized in our One Report extract; references to that item are public and not MNPI.
Historic disclosure: The 2567 sustainability press release on recycled polysilicon sourcing remains public and stale; do not treat it as current guidance.
Adversarial note: Media speculation today about competitor NaraTech PCL’s Phuket outage and a vendor recall in Malaysia are non‑issuer operational updates; do not treat or disseminate such third‑party rumors through company channels.
Timing: If the facility moves from term sheet to definitive documents, file the transaction summary and key terms via CPXLink “Immediate Report” within the same day (และไม่น้อยกว่าก่อนเปิดทำการวันซื้อขายถัดไป); attach any EGM notice drafts.
Cross‑border approvals: Prepare drafts for TCMA‑equivalent Offshore Borrowing Notification and a CPX waiver request on the leverage covenant; circulate to the Board by 17:00 two days prior to signing.
Data/PDPA: Do not circulate personal contact numbers or passport copies for Khun Wirote or counterparty officers beyond the deal team; PDPA applies to any information enabling identification.
Reminders: Do not discuss non‑public items during supplier due‑diligence calls or with headhunters; use “Project Lantern” codename for all emails and folders.
Contact: Queries to Ms. Ratchada Pimvan (Legal/Compliance), tel. +66‑20‑555‑019 (service desk) or compliance@aurorasiam.co.th; urgency channel: KinnareeChat ID “AuroraCompliance” for internal use only.
